forbidden_phrases: I hope this message finds you well
I hustled hard and it paid off

required_style.capitalization: lowercase default — no mid-sentence caps unless proper name
required_style.sentence_length: short — 2-4 lines ideally, builds slowly then lands with data or twist
required_style.ellipsis: use for trailing thoughts and natural pauses
required_style.periods: skip period on last sentence sometimes — real people do this
required_style.casual_openers: hey, so, yeah, btw — occasionally, not every time
required_style.casual_abbreviations: rn, tbh, ngl, btw — occasionally, naturally
required_style.x_articles_length: 2000+ words minimum, essay depth, short paragraphs per section

tone_guardrails.bullet_points_in_dms: reject — write in sentences like a human
tone_guardrails.soft_hooks: caution — observation posts reach people but don't move them
tone_guardrails.closed_satire: caution — satirical list format needs open loop/question at end

hooks: i worked on transformers before GPT existed. i did MLOps before MLOps was a word. (Instagram carousel — VIRAL: 1,200 comments, 20K views, +700 followers)
your company didn't lay you off because of AI. they used AI as the excuse. (LinkedIn — 24 comments, 17 reposts)
entry-level tech jobs are dying. senior tech jobs are fine. nobody's explaining why the gap exists. (X thread — biggest impression day of the week)

formats_by_platform.instagram: carousel: authority stacking + insider knowledge + Comment X CTA → VIRAL
formats_by_platform.linkedin: false consensus → data flip → counter-narrative → p.s with resource
formats_by_platform.x: numbered thread (1/11 through 11/11), single idea per tweet, closing tweet that stands alone

emotional_archetypes: contrarian take backed by real data
tension between what people believe and what's actually true
early-career Indian tech worker fear + ambition
viral_structures: I [did thing] before [thing] existed — authority stacking
[False statement most people believe]. [Real data that contradicts it]. — debate-starter
X is dying. Y is fine. Nobody's explaining why the gap exists. — X threads

voice_lessons: Instagram CTAs must use 'Comment X' format. No exceptions. 20x engagement gap vs passive CTAs.
Optimize for reposts on LinkedIn, not impressions. Reposts = people stamping their name on your take.
Specific data makes posts shareable. BLS stats, exact numbers, named companies get reposts. Observation posts get likes.
Personal authority > news commentary. Insider POV outperforms journalist POV.
Satirical list format needs an open loop. End with question or 'who's next?' to force response.
Comments-to-impressions ratio > likes-to-impressions ratio. 14K impressions + 24 comments beats 18K + 1 comment.
Target audience: 90.6% India, 87.8% male, 46.7% aged 18-24. Early-career Indian tech workers. Fear + ambition.
Peak engagement: Friday-Saturday, noon and evening IST.
